mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, role, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM users
AND ( LOWER(username) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT users_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, email, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{role}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, role = #{role}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
